comment: DC2 donor-distribution registry (docs/dc2/ENEMY-DISTRIBUTION-PLAN.md D2/D4/D5). One row per weighable donor species (= Dc2SpeciesTable Known+LAND, locked by Dc2EnemyDistributionTests). default_weight 0-15 biases the per-room weighted donor pick (equal weights over a room's valid donors reproduce the legacy uniform pick exactly); room_cap bounds how many rooms a species may win per seed in weighted mode (null = unlimited). Tuning rarity is an edit HERE, not a code change. Pool MEMBERSHIP still comes from the boss/setpiece toggles; weights only bias among members.
aquatic_comment: The aquatic rows (0x05/0x0a/0x0b) are only ever weighable when the experimental Dc2AllowWaterLevelEnemySwaps flag is ON (wave-only donors, K72); with the flag OFF they are absent from the donor pool so their presence here does not change default output. Low weights = rare curiosities (non-functional on land). E32 (0x0c) is intentionally ABSENT: hard-excluded as a donor in every flag combination via Dc2SpeciesTable.IsCrashProneDonorType (crash RCA 2026-07-17, dump 13-22-55: spawner AI 0x431fe0 reads a NULL spawn-anchor at actor+0x210 on land, AV @0x432061). Its sibling E31 (0x0b) is live-confirmed safe and stays.
